significant_findings_note: No contrasts cleared all three gates (n>=8 per group, p<0.05, |Cliff's delta|>=0.2). Either too little data or no format/time differences are large enough yet.

methodology.test: Mann-Whitney U (two-sided, tie-corrected, normal approximation with continuity correction)
methodology.rationale: Impression counts are heavily right-skewed; rank-based tests are robust to that shape. Cliff's delta floor of 0.20 excludes tiny-but-significant differences that aren't practically actionable.

top.text:
21 days until August 3. The Cubs still need a starter — and the Joe Ryan trade just got complicated.

Minnesota is in the Wild Card hunt. The Twins aren't selling. Jed Hoyer needs a Plan B, and he needs it fast.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

Bounce-back time at Wrigley. Cubs vs. Tigers, Game 2.

David Peterson (4-7, 6.45 ERA) faces Framber Valdez (5-6, 4.10 ERA). Tigers lead the series 1-0. Peterson's last start: 5 IP, 1 ER vs. Baltimore.

He needs another one tonight. 7:05 PM

Aroldis Chapman: 2.20 ERA. 19 saves. Still elite at 38.

The Cubs are connected. He closed Game 7 for this team in 2016. Palencia is on the IL and this bullpen has no true closer.

17 days to August 3. The reunion is writing itself. ⚾

#Cub

Matt Shaw is BACK.

The Cubs activated him from the IL ahead of the Twins series opener — a proven bat returning just as the second half begins. 💪

Shaw was locked in before the wrist injury. Getting him back for the stretch run matters.

#

Falling to 49-49 Minnesota at home to open the second half isn't the start Chicago had in mind.

54-43.

Wild Card race won't wait for the Cubs to find their footing.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs

Cubs vs. Twins. 3 games. Wrigley Field. The second half starts tonight.

Cubs (54-42, No. 1 NL Wild Card) host the Twins (48-49) — both clubs with playoff stakes on the line.

Colin Rea vs. Bailey Ober. First pitch 7:05 PM CT. 🏟️

#Cubs #Go

Cubs farm system checking in:

Owen Ayers crushed his 22nd homer of the season for the Knoxville Smokies last night. 💪

Iowa Cubs kicked off the second half with a nationally televised game on CBS Sports Network. The pipeline is full.

#Cub

Owen Ayers made his Triple-A debut in Saturday's 10-9 Iowa loss to Memphis. The No. 10 Cubs prospect joined Iowa after bashing 22 homers for Knoxville.

One step closer to Wrigley. Keep watching.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

54-42 at the break. No. 1 NL Wild Card — one game up on the Phillies, two on the Marlins.

Three months of grinding through a rotation crisis, and the Cubs walk in FIRST. The Cardinals are watching from the outside.

This race is Chicago's

MLB-leading WAR entering the break. PCA takes the stage tomorrow night.

Citizens Bank Park, Philadelphia. FOX. 8 PM ET. Chicago's lone rep — and by the numbers, the best player in baseball. 🌟

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Trent Thornton update: no fractures.

CT scan clean after Monday's 108.9 mph comebacker. He played catch Tuesday, tests off a mound today, and Thursday's off-day buys extra time.

The Cubs may dodge another IL stint — a big deal right now.

13 days to the deadline. The Cubs just saw Thornton leave with a comebacker to the leg. The rotation that needed Taillon to come back healthy got 4.1 rusty innings.

Sonny Gray. Joe Ryan. Michael Wacha. Jed Hoyer has the chips and the need.

21 days until August 3. The Cubs still need a starter — and the Joe Ryan trade just got complicated.

Minnesota is in the Wild Card hunt. The Twins aren't selling. Jed Hoyer needs a Plan B, and he needs it fast.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

Series finale. Great American Ball Park. 12:40 PM CT.

Matthew Boyd takes the ball against Andrew Abbott and the Reds. Split the first two. One game left.

Cubs (53-42) can take this series and head into the All-Star break with all the mome

Cubs 53-42 heading to the series finale.

bottom_performers.text:
Matt Shaw won't be back before the All-Star break.

The left wrist sprain isn't considered serious, but the Cubs are being cautious. Kevin Alcantara picks up the slack.

Post-break return is the target. Not a long-term concern.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

Jameson Taillon made his first rehab start Sunday at High-A South Bend — 3.1 IP, 1 ER, 45 pitches.

If all goes to plan, he's back in the Cubs rotation before the All-Star break.

The cavalry is almost here.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

Wild card check-in, July 7:

Cubs 50-40, tied for No. 2 NL wild card
Cardinals 47-40 — 1.5 games back in the race

One hot week in Baltimore turns a tight race into breathing room.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Baltimore has lost 8 of their last 10 games. The Orioles are in freefall.

The Cubs arrive at Camden Yards rolling — 7-3 over their last 10, 50-40, No. 2 NL wild card.

Timing. Is. Everything.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

Cubs arrive in Baltimore for a 3-game set at Camden Yards — first pitch 5:35 PM CT tonight.

Matthew Boyd vs. Shane Baz. Cubs (50-40), No. 2 NL wild card. Orioles (42-49), losers of 8 of their last 10.

The second half starts here.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
